framework.name: Two-Scenario Agent Auth Model
framework.description: Industry distinction between 'delegated access' (agent acts on behalf of specific user, requires consent) and 'service accounts' (agent acts as itself for system tasks, no user context). Different OAuth flows serve each: Authorization Code + PKCE for delegated, Client Credentials Grant for M2M.
framework.raw_quote: The two distinct scenarios you'll run into: 1. Delegated access... 2. Service accounts
